meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Template to Solve No SaaS Knowledge
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between theory and production. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to launch your first SaaS app as a student developer.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates SaaS complexity by providing a pre-configured, scalable architecture. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate, integrate authentication, and deploy production-ready code. This workflow allows students to focus on core product logic rather than infrastructure, drastically accelerating your journey to a professional portfolio.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank IDE, the weight of 'SaaS architecture' feeling like an insurmountable wall. You have the coding skills, but the bridge between a script and a production-ready application remains hidden in the fog of deployment, database schema management, and authentication flows.

The industry doesn't wait for perfect knowledge; it rewards those who build. The Antigravity template is your tactical advantage—a battle-tested blueprint designed to bypass the 'no SaaS knowledge' trap. Combined with the surgical precision of Claude Code, you are no longer just writing lines; you are architecting a business.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish the base project structure to ensure your environment is secure, modular, and ready for rapid iteration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity base template with TypeScript, Next.js 14, and Tailwind CSS. Ensure strict typing and modular folder structure.

steps.title: Configure Identity & Access
steps.description: Integrate robust authentication without reinventing the wheel, ensuring your app is secure from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up authentication middleware using the Antigravity auth module. Configure OAuth providers for GitHub and Google.

steps.title: Implement Database Schema
steps.description: Define your data models using the template's ORM integration to maintain consistency across your application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a User and Subscription model using the Antigravity Prisma schema. Define relationships for multi-tenant data isolation.

steps.title: Inject Core Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your unique product idea into functional code using Claude's ability to interpret your high-level intent.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a CRUD API endpoint for the main app feature, ensuring it respects the existing user session and tenant ID.

steps.title: Automate Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Bridge the gap to production by setting up a CI/CD pipeline that verifies your build before every push.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Action workflow for the Antigravity template that runs linting, tests, and deploys to Vercel.

pro_tips: Always use 'context-first' prompting: tell Claude the business goal before defining the technical implementation.
Leverage the Antigravity 'mock-data' flag during dev to test UI states without needing a live database connection.
Keep your Claude Code session scoped to specific features; don't try to refactor the entire codebase in one prompt.
Use Antigravity's built-in logging middleware to debug API flows in real-time, saving hours of console.log debugging.
Treat your generated code as a draft; manually audit the security-sensitive parts of the auth middleware before committing.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on gathering user feedback and iterating on the feedback loop by adding one high-impact feature per week.
content.conversion_block: Stop dreaming about building and start shipping. This template is the exact toolset used by top-tier engineers to bypass months of trial and error. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
